Appearances:

Plaintiff CITYWIDE PROPERTIES, INC., is present. Represented by
Attorney DANIEL BORENSTEIN, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant SALLY SOLIAI, is present.
Attorney JETHRO BUSCH, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem GARY LOUIE , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.
